## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] `terraform fmt -check -recursive terraform`
- [ ] Relevant `terraform validate` commands
- [ ] Relevant `terraform plan` reviewed, if applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated, if applicable

## Security Review

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials were added
- [ ] No private domain names, internal-only addresses, or personal information were added unintentionally
- [ ] New configurable values are exposed as variables with safe example defaults

## Notes

Include rollout, migration, or reviewer context if needed.
